transcript.text:
All the locals know this place
Been here for 30 years
[Jjolla]
[Let's eat Jjolla]
[You can eat more...?]
[Yes]
[Starting now]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jangmi Plaza located in Jamsil
I've done a mukbang here before in this plaza
I had a really good meal
There are lots of good restaurants in here
What I'm eating today is called Jjolla It's very unique
This place has been here for 30 years All the locals know about this place
Let's head inside
[Jangmi Plaza]

[Underground shops]
[Hwanhee Bunsik] [Seoul, Jamsil Jangmi Plaza]
Hello
-Can we have a photo? -Yes, of course
I've been a regular for 30 years
They never changed It's delicious
Break up the egg when you eat Jjolla
4 different types of Jjolla
Let's get all of them And they're also known for their fried rice
4 Jjollas and fried rice would be good
All 4 flavors of Jjolla, please
As well as fried rice
You're eating all of that?
Yes I am
Do they give big portions?
It's a lot more food than you think

You didn't finish yours
[More than 1 serving]
Thank you
What's this?
Which one is which?
They all look very similar except for jjajang
Rice cake?
Spicy?
Curry?
Bon appetit
The name Jjolla is unique
What first?
Regular first
Chewy noodles on top Ramyun noodles on the bottom
That's cool
Never heard of Jjolla before either

Cute name
Let's take a bite
It's like spicy rice cake noodles
It's not too spicy This must be the regular one
Eating 2 at the same time gives it 2 different flavors at the same time
Chewy and soft
I love the texture
It's tangy and it has a kick to it
Rice cake
-Are you Tzuyang? -Yes
They want a photo
Thank you
Regular jjolla It's not spicy
Sweet and tasty And it's really cheap
Let's try the jjajang (black bean sauce)
Mix it Aw, it got soggy

It's soaked in black bean sauce
This brings back old memories
It's something that I used to have as a kid in front of schools or afterschools
It's as if I'm a kid again
The fact that something like this is still around
Yes, this is it
Fried rice
It has cheese on top
They warmed it up for me Thank you
Can I add more cheese?
More cheese because I like cheese
This looks scrumptious
Bon appetit
Looks great
It's really good
I love the cheesy flavor And their sauce is really good

I highly recommend 2 slices of cheese
People usually order like this 1 fried rice and 1 jjolla
It's like an instant spicy rice cake set
Jjolla on top of rice
Is that too much?
-Is it good? -It's really good
-Can you finish it? -I can order more after this
Even more?
-You make it look good -Because it's good
[Finishing that alone won't be easy]
My grandmother taught me to hold the spoon like this to scrape the scorched rice
I asked her to have this undercooked a little And now she warmed it up again
Curry and Spicy Jjolla here
I'll mix it up
I can smell the curry
Yum

Savory
Whenever I see Yaki Mandu (fried dumplings) I think about the ones from Apple House
It was really good
I'll try the spicy one now
How spicy will it be? I'm a little worried
It doesn't look too spicy
Is this really spicy?
Is it spicy?
-A little? -Not really
Thank you
A little spicy
Spicy actually
Less sweetness and more spice
It's the best
In between Shin ramyun and Buldak (Fire Chicken Noodles)
They're taking photos of me

-Thank you so much -Thank you
-I've met you here last time too -Yes, that's right!
It's spicy
Don't try this if you're not good with spicy
I'm not good with spicy food
Then why'd you order it?
I can eat it
Do you have a belly? No, you don't have any...
There's a cafe here so I ordered a matcha latte
Thank you
So good
Where did the food go?
It's in my belly
All in there?
I've stored it in here
Let's switch things up

Fried rice
-Do you want more soup? -Yes please
Thank you
Lovely
Now for the spicy...
-That's the spicy one? -Yes
It's spicy but I will try
This one tastes the best though
That one was for kids This one's for the grown ups
Milk is helping the spice go away
The sauce is not that spicy
But it gets spicy once it gets soaked up
That neutralizes the spiciness
Dumplings
Amazing
You're a good eater

-Are you finished? -Yes
You really do eat a lot
I just love eating
But that's just way too much food
I can digest pretty fast
Another bowl of soup, please
Thank you
Was that like 5 refills?
This is my 5th bowl
7 pieces of fish cake
[The owner wants a photo too]
1 last piece of dumpling
All gone
-Do you want more? -It's okay
Drink some of that
I'm done Coca cola too
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
